reason_for_decision: The article passes with a strong architecture-level comparison, especially around revisit behavior, lifecycle burden, and mission fit.
strengths: The article centers the comparison on revisit behavior and mission fit instead of simply treating AESA as the modern winner.
It balances acquisition and lifecycle considerations without becoming procurement fluff.
The system-level section on how scan behavior affects upper-layer cueing adds real design value.
summary_assessment: This is a high-quality comparison article. It is technically credible, restrained, and genuinely useful for readers choosing between scan architectures.
